description: Headless CMS SDK: register your own React components as blocks, render cmssy pages in your own Next.js app, and edit them visually. cmssy keeps content, commerce, auth, forms and data; your app owns rendering and hosting.
rules: cmssy is headless-only and multi-tenant: every workspace is isolated by workspace_id. Always scope data queries by workspace; never assume a single workspace or hardcode a site URL.
Store canonical URLs in content (e.g. assets.cmssy.io/...), never host-specific URLs. The consuming app translates hosts at render time.
Block components must not substitute default values for empty text/copy/media content props - render conditionally. Empty-array and boolean/config defaults are fine.
A block's server `loader` runs only during SSR (CmssyServerPage), never in the editor; the component receives `data: undefined` in the editor and must degrade gracefully.
Use queryScoped (or graphqlRequest) from @cmssy/react for delivery-API calls; queryScoped auto-injects workspaceId and the x-workspace-id header.
Member auth uses httpOnly cookies via createCmssyAuthRoute - never store member tokens in localStorage.
createCmssyPage(config, blocks, options?) requires the blocks array as the second argument; pass options.editor or edit mode throws.
